Request a demo

Integrations

Connect what you already have.

SYAG is designed to work with the cameras, sensors, and devices already installed in your compound. No ripping and replacing. Connect your existing infrastructure and start seeing everything in one place.

Camera & VMS integrations

LUNA / VisionLab (WebSocket)

SYAG connects natively to LUNA and VisionLab camera management systems via real-time WebSocket. Camera events — motion detection, intrusion alerts, ANPR triggers — are ingested instantly and fed into the SYAG incident pipeline. No polling delays. No manual checks.

ONVIF-compatible cameras

SYAG supports ONVIF-compliant IP cameras from all major manufacturers. If your camera speaks ONVIF, it connects to SYAG.

What camera integration means for your compound

  • Camera events automatically create incidents
  • Camera events can trigger Flow automation rules
  • Live feeds accessible from the Operations Center
  • Event history per camera, searchable and linked to incidents

IoT device support

SYAG connects to IoT devices via Azure IoT Hub (S1 Standard). SYAG maintains a system-managed device type catalog — your team registers device instances by selecting from known types. No custom event schemas required.

Device type Use case
Panic buttons Guard or resident emergency alert
Environmental sensors Temperature, smoke, flood detection
UPS monitors Power failure detection
Access control points Door/gate open/close events
Perimeter sensors Fence vibration, beam break
Vehicle presence sensors Gate loop detection

Notification channels

SMS — Twilio

SYAG sends SMS alerts to guards, supervisors, and admins via Twilio. Incident escalations, missed patrol notifications, and visitor overstay alerts are delivered instantly.

WhatsApp

Visitor QR passes are delivered via WhatsApp. Integration via WhatsApp Business API.

Email

All platform notifications can also be delivered via email. Daily activity reports, incident summaries, and scheduled patrol reports sent automatically.

Push notifications

Native push notifications via the SYAG mobile app for guards and supervisors. Works over 4G with no internet connectivity requirement beyond basic data.

Open API for custom integrations

SYAG provides a REST API for enterprise customers who need to integrate SYAG data with other business systems — HR platforms, access control systems, reporting tools, or custom dashboards.

Enterprise API access is available on the Business plan.

Don't see your camera or device listed?

Talk to us — we add new integrations regularly.

Contact our integrations team →
